---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**The problem**
What real on-call situation would this make better? Bonus points for a
specific anecdote — Runway features are evaluated against "does this
make a real shift better".

**The proposed solution**
How would you like it to work?

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any other approaches, scripts, or workarounds you've tried.

**Additional context**
Mockups, screenshots, or links to similar features in other tools.
